feedback.text: In this letter, I would like to ask that the shutdown of games sold to one in the past should be explicitly recorded again in writing. The video games, which even have the possibility of a single player mode, cannot be fully ingested without allowing customers/players to keep it on their own and independently. This is worthy and right. I also saw like lobbyists trying to undermine this request, and I would find it appropriate if we, consumers, were protected from such “unfair commercial practices related to dark patterns”.
